category_sources: Official lowdown page describes Markdown translation to HTML5, roff, LaTeX, gemini, OpenDocument, and terminal output.
source_facts.description says lowdown is a simple markdown translator.
display_name_sources: Official lowdown page title is lowdown - simple markdown translator.
docs_sources: Official lowdown page links to lowdown(1), lowdown-diff(1), lowdown(5), and lowdown(3) documentation.
repo_sources: GitHub repository README points back to kristaps.bsd.lv/lowdown for stable releases and documentation.
Official lowdown homepage links its GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official lowdown page lists supported output formats and documents CLI, language, and library interfaces.
